_comment: Per-connector configuration. 'ready' connectors call a real public API today; 'connectorReady' ones have the full pipeline wired but need credentials or a target list before they return anything. Fill in the empty lists/keys to activate a connector — no code changes needed.

greenhouse._note: Greenhouse's public Job Board API (boards-api.greenhouse.io) has no cross-company search; add each company's board token (the slug in their /jobs page URL) to search it.

lever._note: Lever's public Postings API (api.lever.co) is per-company, same as Greenhouse; add each company's Lever slug.

ashby._note: Ashby's public Job Board API (api.ashbyhq.com/posting-api) is per-organisation; add each org's job board name.

remoteok._note: RemoteOK's public API (remoteok.com/api) is a single global feed of remote listings; no per-company config needed.

upwork._note: Upwork's public job-search API requires an authenticated developer application; the connector is wired but returns nothing until apiKey/apiSecret are supplied.

linkedinJobs._note: LinkedIn has no public, unauthenticated job-search API, and its Terms of Service prohibit scraping. This connector only activates against LinkedIn's official Jobs API/Talent Solutions, if and when that access is provisioned.

googleJobs._note: Google for Jobs has no direct public API; this connector is wired for a third-party search API (e.g. a jobs-focused SERP provider) once a provider and key are chosen.

wellfound._note: Wellfound (AngelList Talent) has no public API; this connector activates once an access method is identified.

flexjobs._note: Connector-ready, as specified: FlexJobs requires a paid account and has no public API.

uaeRecruiters._note: Career pages vary per recruiter/agency with no shared API; add each real career-page URL to monitor once identified.

consultingFirms._note: Same as uaeRecruiters: add each firm's real career-page URL once identified.
